gcp.bigquery.datasets.get.description: Returns the dataset specified by datasetID.

required.description: Required. Dataset ID of the requested dataset
Required. Project ID of the requested dataset

gcp.bigquery.datasets.undelete.description: Undeletes a dataset which is within time travel window based on datasetId. If a time is specified, the dataset version deleted at that time is undeleted, else the last live version is undeleted.

required.description: Required. Dataset ID of dataset being deleted
Required. Project ID of the dataset to be undeleted

gcp.bigquery.datasets.list.description: Lists all datasets in the specified project to which the user has been granted the READER dataset role.

required.description: Required. Project ID of the datasets to be listed

gcp.bigquery.projects.getServiceAccount.description: RPC to get the service account for a project used for interactions with Google Cloud KMS

required.description: Required. ID of the project.

gcp.bigquery.rowAccessPolicies.getIamPol.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

required.description: REQUIRED: The resource for which the policy is being requested. See [Resource names](https://cloud.google.com/apis/desig

gcp.bigquery.models.list.description: Lists all models in the specified dataset. Requires the READER dataset role. After retrieving the list of models, you can get information about a particular model by calling the models.get method.

required.description: Required. Dataset ID of the models to list.
Required. Project ID of the models to list.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

required.description: Required. Project ID of the requested model.

gcp.bigquery.jobs.getQueryResults.description: RPC to get the results of a query job.

required.description: Required. Project ID of the query job.
Required. Job ID of the query job.

gcp.bigquery.jobs.list.description: Lists all jobs that you started in the specified project. Job information is available for a six month period after creation. The job list is sorted in reverse chronological order, by job creation tim

required.description: Project ID of the jobs to list.

gcp.bigquery.jobs.get.description: Returns information about a specific job. Job information is available for a six month period after creation. Requires that you're the person who ran the job, or have the Is Owner project role.

required.description: Required. Project ID of the requested job.
Required. Job ID of the requested job.

gcp.bigquery.jobs.query.description: Runs a BigQuery SQL query synchronously and returns query results if the query completes within a specified timeout.

required.description: Required. Project ID of the query request.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

required.description: Required. Job ID of the job to cancel
Required. Project ID of the job to cancel
